untranslatable_reason: Signal requires EPS rank, quarterly earnings growth rates, and earnings deceleration metrics. These are fundamental data indicators not present in the allowed technical indicator list (price action, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). EPS rank, earnings growth percentages, and quarter-over-quarter earnings comparisons are not available in the technical indicator universe provided.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentals-based and requires access to earnings data (EPS rank scores, quarterly earnings growth rates, five-year average growth rates, and quarter-over-quarter deceleration detection). The backtest engine would need to integrate fundamental data sources to implement this rule. Cannot be expressed using only technical price/volume indicators.
